my_api_tokens.active_key_exists_tooltip: An active key already exists. Deactivate the existing key before issuing a new one.
my_api_tokens.api_auth_warning: API keys are sent as Bearer tokens. Keep them out of logs and screenshots.
my_api_tokens.api_key_required_message: Replace {{KEY}} in the examples below with the API key you saved.
my_api_tokens.copy_failed_message:
Could not copy to the clipboard. Copy it manually:
{text}
my_api_tokens.create_modal_description: Issue a new API key. The original key is shown only once immediately after issuance.
my_api_tokens.delete_key_confirm: Delete this API key? This action cannot be undone.
my_api_tokens.error_key_delete_error: An error occurred while deleting the API key.
my_api_tokens.error_key_delete_error_message: Something went wrong while deleting the API key.
my_api_tokens.error_key_delete_failed_message: The API key could not be deleted.
my_api_tokens.error_key_issue_error: An error occurred while issuing the API key.
my_api_tokens.error_key_issue_error_message: Something went wrong while issuing the API key.
my_api_tokens.error_key_issue_failed_message: The API key could not be issued.
my_api_tokens.error_key_list_fetch_error: An error occurred while fetching API keys.
my_api_tokens.error_key_list_fetch_error_message: Something went wrong while loading the API key list.
my_api_tokens.error_key_regenerate_error: An error occurred while regenerating the API key.
my_api_tokens.error_key_regenerate_error_message: Something went wrong while regenerating the API key.
my_api_tokens.error_key_regenerate_failed_message: The API key could not be regenerated.
my_api_tokens.error_key_status_change_error: An error occurred while changing the API key status.
my_api_tokens.error_key_status_change_error_message: Something went wrong while changing the API key status.
my_api_tokens.error_key_status_change_failed: Failed to change API key status
my_api_tokens.error_key_status_change_failed_message: The API key status could not be changed.
my_api_tokens.error_preset_url_load_failed: Failed to load API example settings.
my_api_tokens.error_response_parse_failed: Failed to parse the error response.
my_api_tokens.expiry_days_description: Enter a value from 1 to 365 days. The default is 90 days.
my_api_tokens.feature_compatibility: hanimo-webui proxies your local model server settings, keeping client configuration simple.
my_api_tokens.feature_standard_compatible: Works with standard OpenAI-compatible clients such as OpenAI SDKs, Continue, and Cursor.
my_api_tokens.key_issued_description: You will not be able to view this key again. Save it now.
my_api_tokens.key_unavailable: For security, the original key is not shown again.
my_api_tokens.no_keys_description: Issue a key first to use code assistants or the OpenAI-compatible API.
my_api_tokens.one_time_display_note: The original key is shown only once immediately after issuance. Paste the key you saved into the {{KEY}} placeholder in the example.
my_api_tokens.openai_api_compatible_format: Uses OpenAI-compatible request and response formats.
my_api_tokens.openai_proxy_description: Use your issued key to call the local hanimo-webui /v1 endpoints in OpenAI API format.
my_api_tokens.page_description: Issue and manage personal API keys for the OpenAI-compatible API and code assistants.
my_api_tokens.regenerate_key_confirm: This will deactivate the existing key and issue a new one. Continue?
my_api_tokens.select_key_description: The original key is not inserted into examples automatically.
my_api_tokens.usage_guide_1: API keys are shown only once immediately after issuance. Store them somewhere safe.
my_api_tokens.usage_guide_2: Keep only one active key per account whenever possible.
my_api_tokens.usage_guide_3: If a key is exposed or suspicious, deactivate it immediately and issue a new one.
my_api_tokens.usage_guide_4: This key authenticates requests to the OpenAI-compatible /v1 API.
my_api_tokens.vscode_warning: Put only the necessary key into config files and do not commit it to shared repositories.
